ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled_tuned<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Response shows understanding of the guardian role but lacks urgency and naturalness in tone, which could be improved for better rapport with a stranger.
